title: Saudi Arabian Pine Nut Fritters
description: A crispy and sweet Middle Eastern-inspired dessert made with pine nuts and a hint of cardamom. Perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, cardamom, and salt.
Add the melted butter, eggs, vanilla extract, and milk to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
